accessibility_incidents.title: Severe waterlogging on pavement near Kasba Post Office
accessibility_incidents.description: Due to a localized drainage clog, the main walking pavement is fully submerged, making it impassable for elderly residents and wheelchair users.

accessibility_incidents.title: Metro elevator breakdown at Gariahat crossing
accessibility_incidents.description: The elevator assisting senior passengers is currently non-functional.

accessibility_incidents.title: Tactile path cleared near Behala Tram Depot
accessibility_incidents.description: Loose brick piles from private building construction have been successfully cleared by local volunteers.

transport_congestion.title: Bypass connector traffic diversion
transport_congestion.description: Vehicular traffic is moving extremely slowly due to water accumulation on the lane connecting to the EM Bypass.

transport_congestion.title: Seven-point crossing bottleneck clearing
transport_congestion.description: A stalled public bus on the flyover ramp has been towed. Traffic flow is returning to normal.

environmental_stress.title: Air Quality Index (AQI) Spike
environmental_stress.description: Local PM2.5 readings spiked to 180 (Unhealthy) around the heavy traffic zone near the crossing.

environmental_stress.title: Community tree planting near Central Park
environmental_stress.description: Neighborhood association successfully planted 50 saplings to improve local air quality and provide shade.

civic_complaints.title: Streetlight outage near Jadavpur University Gate 4
civic_complaints.description: Three consecutive street lamps have been dark for three nights, creating safety concerns for students.

civic_complaints.title: Scattered garbage dump cleaned
civic_complaints.description: Overflowing waste near the walking path has been cleared by municipal workers following community reports.

community_sentiment.summary: Neighbors are expressing worry about the lack of drainage clearing before the heavy monsoon spells, noting vulnerable seniors are getting cut off.
Local youths are coordinating via message boards to walk female students home due to the streetlight outage near the campus.
High appreciation recorded for community members who set up temporary drinking water stations near the auto stand during peak afternoon heat.
Vendors expressed relief that the waste blockage was cleared quickly, allowing normal operations.

missions.title: Assist elderly with pharmacy pickups in Kasba
missions.whyItMatters: Drainage overflows near the Kasba Post Office have made the sidewalks unusable. Several elderly residents require medication deliveries.

missions.title: Escort transit walks near Jadavpur University
missions.whyItMatters: The streetlights along the primary walking lane to the station have failed, raising safety worries for late-night classes.

missions.title: Distribute water near Gariahat crossing
missions.whyItMatters: With the metro elevator broken and high afternoon temperatures, senior commuters navigating the stairs need hydration and rest support.

momentum.title: Tactile path cleared in Behala
momentum.description: Local volunteers removed construction debris near the Tram Depot, restoring safe access for visually impaired pedestrians.

momentum.title: Lake Market sanitation restored
momentum.description: Overflowing waste near the vendor pathways was swiftly cleared following community reports, restoring hygiene.

momentum.title: Park Circus bottleneck easing
momentum.description: A stalled bus was towed, resolving a major traffic choke point and reducing commuter frustration.

momentum.title: Tree planting in Salt Lake
momentum.description: Residents planted 50 saplings near Central Park, taking collective action to improve local air quality.
